scope: Every MCP tool an agent uses to read or act on release state (board reads, get_blocked, get_slice_context, approve_merge, plan mutation, catalog counts) returns real data for a current-format release instead of silently-empty results or a wrong-track error.

test_results.output: all 39 test packages ok, 0 failures (internal/mcp 0.151s; full list in proof.md)

reachability_artifacts: internal/mcp test suite drives the same code paths an MCP client reaches over the wire: TestGetBoard, TestGetBlockedExtractsViolations (proof.json.not_delivered -> get_blocked, with a proof.md decoy asserting the legacy scrape stays dead), TestGetSliceContext (proof.json.not_delivered -> get_slice_context violations field, same decoy), TestDeferSliceWritesRuleTwo, TestRerunSliceWritesPID, TestPatchSliceWritesInstructions, TestApproveMergeRejectsUnverified, TestListReleases, TestSetTrackUpdates, TestSetTrackColon

AC-04: catalog.go releaseStateSummary/countSliceTableRows derive counts from board.json + status.json; evidence: TestPlanReleaseExisting

AC-05: tools_test.go and lint_test.go build fixtures via writeBoardJSON/writeLintBoardJSON (current board.BoardRecord shape) instead of legacy tracks: YAML in index.md; proof fixtures are proof-v1 proof.json via writeProofJSON

divergence: sworn llm-check --type ac-satisfaction could not run in the implementer session: no SWORN_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / $SWORN_MODEL key available. Rule 2 deferral recorded in journal.md; the fresh-context /verify-slice pass is the model-backed check for this slice.
